rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §43.0033, which governs expenditure reporting by permanent school fund consultants.
quote: A consultant, advisor, broker, or other person providing services to the State Board of Education relating to the management and investment of the permanent school fund shall file with the board regularly, as determined by the board, a report that describes in detail any expenditure of more than $50 made by the person on behalf of:
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns PSF consultant expenditure reporting and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
